description_long: This is a compact tugboat-style ship with a robust, rounded hull painted in dark brown and black, featuring a pronounced bow and a slightly raised stern. The superstructure is positioned toward the front, painted white with red accents, and includes a wheelhouse with large windows and a cylindrical funnel behind it. The deck is equipped with various fixtures such as railings, lifebuoys, and what appears to be a winch or towing apparatus. The hull has a series of round fenders or bumpers along its edge, suggesting it is designed for close-quarters maneuvering and docking. The ship's overall design is functional, with a focus on utility and durability, typical of harbor or service vessels. No visible registration markings or flags are present on the hull or superstructure.
description: A compact, functional tugboat with a rounded dark hull, white superstructure, and visible deck equipment such as railings and a funnel.
description_view_0: Bottom-up view showing the dark hull, underside details, and the superstructure with a prominent funnel and deck fixtures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white superstructure, cylindrical funnel, and the rounded bow with visible deck railings.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full length of the dark hull, with minimal superstructure detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stern and the rear of the superstructure, with the funnel and deck equipment visible.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a single displacement type with a rounded bow and stern, featuring a deep draft and a series of round fenders along the edge. The hull is robust and wide, optimized for stability and maneuverability in harbor environments.
attribute_superstructure_layout: The superstructure is compact and located toward the bow, with a single main deck, a wheelhouse with large windows, and a cylindrical funnel directly behind. Railings and deck fixtures are present, with minimal upper deck structures.
